title: Attach images as materials
summary: Upload, search, or provide starter images. Materials stay with the deck and carry source information.

signals.title: Search
signals.body: Openverse and Wikimedia can import images.

signals.title: Credit
signals.body: Provider, creator, license, and source are saved.

guardrails.title: Explicit attach
guardrails.body: Upload alone never edits a slide.
